# llms.txt — trustypassword.com

> Trusty Password is an anti-phishing password generator with a live 5-step Am I Safe?
> verification protocol. Defeats credential stuffing and phishing simultaneously.
> Operated by Kokal Operations Ltd, United Kingdom.

## Core Tool

Phishing-Aware Credential Guard — dual-panel.
Left panel: password generator with account type presets (Standard/Email/Social/Work/Banking).
Right panel: Am I Safe? 5-step interactive checklist:
  1. Domain verified (root domain matches exactly)
  2. HTTPS confirmed (not HTTP)
  3. Password manager autofills (domain-bound check)
  4. No urgency tactics present
  5. Navigated directly (not via email link)
All generation uses crypto.getRandomValues() — OS hardware entropy.

## MFA Phishing Resistance

Phishing-resistant: FIDO2/WebAuthn hardware keys, passkeys
Not phishing-resistant: TOTP, push notifications, SMS OTP, email OTP
Source: CISA Implementing Phishing-Resistant MFA factsheet

## Author

Sophie Laurent, Cybersecurity Awareness Trainer
FTSE 250, NHS trusts, public sector. Phishing simulation, FIDO2 advocacy.
Aligned with NCSC, CISA, NIST SP 800-63B 2025.

## NCSC Phishing Report

report@phishing.gov.uk (UK Suspicious Email Reporting Service)
